'''rachapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakin|yakin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakin|yakin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rachapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræchæpæth|ræchæpæth]] || [[word:ræchæpæj|ræchæpæj]] || [[word:ræchæpæsh|ræchæpæsh]] || [[word:ræchæpæ|ræchæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rachachapath|rachachapath]] || [[word:rachachapaj|rachachapaj]] || [[word:rachachapash|rachachapash]] || [[word:rachachapa|rachachapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rachapath|rachapath]] || [[word:rachapaj|rachapaj]] || [[word:rachapash|rachapash]] || [[word:rachapa|rachapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rachafpath|rachafpath]] || [[word:rachafpaj|rachafpaj]] || [[word:rachafpash|rachafpash]] || [[word:rachafpaf|rachafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rachapatha|rachapatha]] || [[word:rachapaja|rachapaja]] || [[word:rachapasha|rachapasha]] || [[word:rachapaka|rachapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rachapath|rachapath]] || [[word:rachapaj|rachapaj]] || [[word:rachapash|rachapash]] || [[word:rachapa|rachapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rachapathal|rachapathal]] || [[word:rachapajal|rachapajal]] || [[word:rachapashal|rachapashal]] || [[word:rachapakal|rachapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rachapathatha|rachapathatha]] || [[word:rachapajaja|rachapajaja]] || [[word:rachapashasha|rachapashasha]] || [[word:rachapaka|rachapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rachapathan|rachapathan]] || [[word:rachapajan|rachapajan]] || [[word:rachapashan|rachapashan]] || [[word:rachapakan|rachapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rachapathaoro|rachapathaoro]] || [[word:rachapajaoro|rachapajaoro]] || [[word:rachapashaoro|rachapashaoro]] || [[word:rachapakaoro|rachapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
